meta.note: Chart type reference for Designer Agent. Use quickLookup to find the right chart for the analysis goal.

bar.name: Bar Chart
bar.designNotes: Gap = bar_width × 0.5. Label bars directly, avoid legend when possible.

horizontal_bar.name: Horizontal Bar Chart
horizontal_bar.designNotes: Preferred over vertical bars when labels are CJK text (>4 chars).

grouped_bar.name: Grouped Bar Chart
grouped_bar.designNotes: Max 3 series. Use chart_colors[0..2]. Add legend.

stacked_bar.name: Stacked Bar Chart
stacked_bar.designNotes: Label segments inside bars if space permits. Show total on top.

butterfly.name: Butterfly Chart
butterfly.designNotes: Center axis with labels. Left bars extend left, right bars extend right.

bullet.name: Bullet Chart
bullet.designNotes: Gray background bands for ranges, colored bar for actual, marker line for target.

dumbbell.name: Dumbbell Chart
dumbbell.designNotes: Two dots connected by a line. Color-code start vs end.

line.name: Line Chart
line.designNotes: Max 3 lines. Add data points as circles. Label endpoints.

area.name: Area Chart
area.designNotes: Use 30-50% opacity fill. Single series preferred.

dual_axis.name: Dual Axis Chart
dual_axis.designNotes: Left Y-axis for primary, right for secondary. Color-match axis labels to lines.

donut.name: Donut Chart
donut.designNotes: Preferred over pie. Center: total or key metric. Use stroke-dasharray technique.

treemap.name: Treemap
treemap.designNotes: Nested rects. Size = value. Color = category. Label inside if space permits.

waterfall.name: Waterfall Chart
waterfall.designNotes: Green for positive, red for negative, gray for total. Connector lines between bars.

kpi_cards.name: KPI Cards
kpi_cards.designNotes: Big number (48-64px) + delta arrow + sparkline + label. Use dashboard 2x2 or 2x3 layout.

gauge.name: Gauge Chart
gauge.designNotes: Semicircle arc. Colored segment for value. Center number.

progress_bar.name: Progress Bar
progress_bar.designNotes: Label left, bar center, percentage right. Use rounded caps.

radar.name: Radar Chart
radar.designNotes: 5-7 axes optimal. Max 2 overlaid series. Fill with low opacity.

scatter.name: Scatter Plot
scatter.designNotes: Optional trend line. Color-code clusters. Size can encode third variable.

matrix_2x2.name: 2×2 Matrix
matrix_2x2.designNotes: 4 quadrants with distinct fills. Label axes and quadrants. Place items as dots/icons.

funnel.name: Funnel Chart
funnel.designNotes: Top-down narrowing. Show absolute numbers + percentages. Use trapezoids or stacked rects.

heatmap.name: Heatmap
heatmap.designNotes: Color gradient from light to dark. Add value labels in cells if readable.

timeline.name: Timeline
timeline.designNotes: Horizontal line with nodes. Cards below. 3-6 nodes optimal.

process_flow.name: Process Flow
process_flow.designNotes: Boxes connected by arrows. Use chevron shapes for linear flow.

sankey.name: Sankey Diagram
sankey.designNotes: Curved paths between nodes. Width = flow volume. Color by source.

swot.name: SWOT Analysis
swot.designNotes: 2×2 grid. Color-code: green(S), blue(O), yellow(W), red(T). 3-5 bullets per quadrant.

concentric.name: Concentric Circles
concentric.designNotes: Inner = most important. Decreasing opacity outward. Label each ring.

flywheel.name: Flywheel / Cycle
flywheel.designNotes: Circular arrow flow. 4-6 nodes. Center label for cycle name.
